violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person was present during time of inspection with Food Safety Manager training. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person was present during time of inspection with Food Safety Manager training. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by cases, and equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Contents of Ice machine were voluntarily disposed of. Ice Machine decommissioned until professionally cleaned. Ice machine in not to be used until evidence of cleaned and sanitized machine is provided to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Sandwich unit 1 was observed held at 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS food items voluntarily disposed of. All food items moved to working refrigeration unit. Establishment is not to use sandwich unit 1 until it is holding temperature below 41DF. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

he cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024

Cold holding unit behind the line was observed in poor repair (not functional) Cold holding unit walk in freezer observed in poor repair (not functional) establishment is sharing freezer space with another tenant. Refrigeration fixtures must be maintained in working order and in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

Non-functional equipment was observed in the back prep area (3 door Fridge). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Corrective Action - Establishment is to have technician provide options for repair. If machine in not repairable machine is to be discarded. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person trained in food safety was present during time of inspection. Establishment must have at least one individual present with a food safety managers designation at all times food is being handled, prepared, or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All ice from ice machine was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine was placed out of service. Ice machine is not to be used until machine professionally cleaned. Establishment is to send evidence of machine being serviced to RIDOH. Deli slicer was wash rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024

Cold holding unit behind the line was observed in poor repair (not functional) Cold holding unit walk in freezer observed in poor repair (not functional) establishment is sharing freezer space with another tenant. Refrigeration fixtures must be maintained in working order and in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

Non-functional equipment was observed in the back prep area (3 door Fridge). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Corrective Action - Establishment is to have technician provide options for repair. If machine in not repairable machine is to be discarded. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
